sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, text_col VARCHAR, num_col INTEGER, list_col LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT id, rpad(text_col, 10, '-') AS padded_text FROM test_data WHERE num_col IS NULL;
SELECT id, text_col, rpad(text_col, 10, '-') AS padded_text FROM test_data WHERE [1, 3] <@ list_col;
SELECT id, rpad(text_col, 15, '<') AS padded_text, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT DISTINCT text_col FROM test_data) AS subq GROUP BY padded_text HAVING cnt > 1;
SELECT id, rpad(text_col, LENGTH(text_col) + 10, '-') FROM test_data WHERE list_col <@ (SELECT list_col FROM test_data WHERE id = 1);
WITH padded AS (SELECT id, rpad(text_col, 8, '') AS padded_text FROM test_data) SELECT * FROM padded WHERE padded_text < '         ';
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, rpad(text_col, 8, 'x') AS padded_text FROM test_data WHERE num_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, rpad(text_col, 5, '-') AS padded_text FROM test_data WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM temp_data WHERE temp_data.padded_text <@ test_data.list_col);
